title: habranthus × floryi
intro: Habranthus × floryi, a hybrid flowering plant, is a cross between Habranthus robustus and Habranthus tenuivaginatus, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. Its bulbs are used in traditional medicine, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the bulb of Habranthus × floryi can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
